pillars.title: Carbon Disclosure
pillars.summary: Mandatory carbon accounting for node operations with quarterly public reporting thresholds aligned to open standards.

pillars.title: Resource Stewardship
pillars.summary: Efficiency targets for compute, storage, and network services with governance review on non-conformance.

pillars.title: Green Protocol Eligibility
pillars.summary: Energy and data-efficiency thresholds for protocol-backed service labelling across civic platforms.

pillars.title: Sustainable Procurement
pillars.summary: Low-carbon vendor preference and verifiable sustainability claims in infrastructure acquisition.

pillars.title: Citizen Environmental Fellowship
pillars.summary: Civic participation in auditing, awareness campaigns, and compliance tooling for green standards.

policy.title: Carbon Disclosure Protocol
policy.summary: Mandates published carbon accounting for all node operations, with quarterly disclosure formats aligned to open standards.

policy.title: Resource Efficiency Directive
policy.summary: Sets efficiency targets for compute, storage, and network subsystems; non-conformance triggers governance review.

policy.title: Green Protocol Eligibility Framework
policy.summary: Services and integrations must meet energy and data-efficiency thresholds to carry the green protocol label.

programs.title: Green Procurement Program
programs.summary: Prefers low-carbon infrastructure providers and hardware vendors with verifiable sustainability claims.

programs.title: Citizen Sustainability Fellowship
programs.summary: Supports citizen contributions to environmental auditing, awareness, and compliance tooling.

programs.title: Zero-Waste Operations Sprint
programs.summary: Targets operational waste reduction across node maintenance, documentation, and civic program logistics.

programs.title: Node Carbon Optimisation
programs.summary: Continuous tuning of node energy profiles, workload scheduling, and thermal efficiency.

standards.title: Green Protocol Eligibility
standards.summary: Services and integrations must meet energy and data-efficiency thresholds to carry the green protocol label.

standards.title: Carbon Disclosure Format
standards.summary: Standardised JSON and PDF disclosure templates for node carbon reporting.

standards.title: Sustainable Hardware Standard
standards.summary: Lifecycle and repairability criteria for civic hardware procurement.

reports.title: Q1 Carbon Disclosure Review
reports.summary: Review of node carbon disclosures, data quality, and open-standard conformance.

reports.title: Annual Efficiency Impact Report
reports.summary: Aggregates efficiency changes, waste reductions, and green protocol adoption across nodes.
